overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along neon-lit wooden walkways beneath towering skyscrapers, passing digital billboards and vending stalls. The scene features heavy atmospheric rain and vibrant teal and pink neon lighting characteristic of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet wooden walkway under the overpass, passing digital billboards on the right

notable_agents.action: person in red coat walking across the path from left to right

entered.detail: elevated highway structure spanning across the walkway with support columns
large curved wall of glowing digital advertisements and neon signs
rain-soaked wooden plank walkway reflecting neon lights
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked wooden walkway beneath an elevated highway structure. Digital billboards glow with pink and teal neon on the right side while skyscrapers loom in the background. A pedestrian in a red coat crosses the path as the camera moves forward through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with palm trees and approaching billboard

events.description: exits covered bridge area into more open vegetated plaza with visible sky

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the open plaza area, approaching a large illuminated billboard ahead

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' in pink neon letters with futuristic artwork
row of small vendor stalls with glowing menu displays and neon signs
tall palm trees and dense shrubs lining the right side of the walkway
modern glass building with teal interior lighting visible through windows

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the bridge into a more open plaza with palm trees lining the path. The massive 'WET DREAM' billboard becomes visible ahead, dominating the view. Food stalls appear on the left while a glass building with teal lighting sits on the right. The rain continues to fall on the wooden planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway with vending machines and large advertisement display

events.description: slows down while approaching and observing the large billboard and vending area

agents.ego_description: slowing down to walk past the vending machines and observe the large billboard up close

notable_agents.action: person walking toward camera then passing by on the right

entered.detail: automated food and drink vending machines with bright displays and warning signs
pile of garbage bags and discarded items at the base of the billboard
yellow triangular warning sign on the vending machine structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrower section dominated by the massive 'WET DREAM' billboard now very close ahead. Vending machines line the left wall with glowing product displays. A pedestrian walks past the camera heading in the opposite direction. Trash bags sit at the base of the billboard, and the area feels more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with distant teal lighting and palm trees

events.description: passes the large billboard and enters open plaza area with distant teal lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the billboard into the open plaza beyond, heading toward distant lights

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with scattered lighting and distant structures
tall light fixtures emitting bright teal illumination in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the billboard into a more open plaza area. The large advertisement is now behind, and the view opens up to show distant teal lighting poles and palm trees. The wooden walkway continues into the rain-soaked distance with glass buildings visible on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk corridor that transitions from a sheltered underpass into an open, neon-lit plaza. It begins on a wooden walkway beneath an elevated highway, moving past glowing pink and teal billboards and a pedestrian in a red coat. As the camera emerges from the bridge, the space expands into a plaza lined with palm trees and food stalls, where a massive Wet Dream billboard begins to dominate the horizon. The scene then tightens as the camera enters a narrower section flanked by glowing vending machines and trash bags, passing a pedestrian while drawing closer to the towering advertisement. Finally, the camera moves past the billboard to reveal a wide-open plaza where the view extends toward distant teal lighting poles and glass buildings under the falling rain.
